name: Kokuyo Co., Ltd.
summary: Kokuyo Co., Ltd. manufactures, purchases, and sells stationery and office furniture products in Japan. The company provides various office paper products, and stationery and PC-related products, as well as information management and meeting management systems; and develops and produces a range of picture story books, and educational toys and goods. It also offers office furniture and furniture for public spaces, as well as configures space for office, government offices and public facilities, educational and medical facilities, retail stores and commercial spaces, and hotels. In addition, the company provides mail-order services for individuals, as well as various local enterprises in the Shanghai and Beijing regions. Further, it engages in the wholesale of stationery, office supplies, office equipment, office-automation equipment, school supplies, and office furniture to distribution companies; and retail of furniture, textiles, and general home furnishings under the Actus brand, as well as offers space design and consultation services. The company was founded in 1905 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
